chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1630 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the petitioner will avail the alternate remedy before the competent Court of Civil jurisdiction. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
